summary: Completed E2E testing of Travel Request module for Sales CRM. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend testing verified all key features: form creation, 15-day policy check, purpose dropdown with 5 options, lead selection for customer visits, budget breakdown, Save as Draft, Submit for Approval, and approval workflow for CEO/Director.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_travel_requests.py - Created new test file for travel request API testing
seed_data_creation: Test data with TEST_ prefix created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Travel Request module is fully functional. Key endpoints tested: GET/POST /api/travel-requests, PUT /api/travel-requests/{id}/approve, GET /api/travel-requests/purposes, GET /api/travel-requests/pending-approvals/count. Session-based auth uses session_id cookie.

Travel Request Page (/travel-requests).details: Page loads correctly with Pending Approvals section for CEO/Director and My Travel Requests section

New Travel Request Form.details: Dialog opens with all required fields: From/To locations, Departure/Return dates, Flexible dates toggle, Purpose dropdown, Budget fields

15-Day Policy Check.details: Short notice warning appears when departure < 15 days with explanation textarea (min 20 characters)

Purpose Dropdown.details: Shows 5 options: Lead/Customer visits, Distribution, Manufacturing, Team visit, Vendor visits

Lead Selection.details: Shows lead search input when purpose is 'Lead / Customer visits', displays selected leads with deal values and Total Opportunity

Budget Breakdown.details: Shows fields for Travel, Accommodation, Local Transport, Meals, Others + Tentative Total Budget

Save as Draft.details: Saves request with 'draft' status, shows success toast, appears in My Travel Requests

Submit for Approval.details: Saves request with 'pending_approval' status, creates action items for CEO/Director

Approval Workflow.details: CEO/Director can view pending approvals, click to see details, and Approve/Reject with reason

Sidebar Navigation.details: REQUESTS section contains 'Leaves' and 'Travel Request' menu items, both navigation links work correctly

backend_tests_summary.test_15_day_policy_short_notice_without_: PASS - Rejects short notice without explanation
backend_tests_summary.test_15_day_policy_short_notice_with_exp: PASS - Accepts short notice with valid explanation
backend_tests_summary.test_create_travel_with_leads: PASS - Creates request with selected leads and opportunity size
backend_tests_summary.test_get_travel_requests_list: PASS - Returns list with user filtering
backend_tests_summary.test_approval_workflow: PASS - CEO can approve pending request
backend_tests_summary.test_rejection_workflow: PASS - CEO can reject with reason
